comment.body:
pmi isn't enouhg in itself. 
it is positive news if it says that capacity becomes output. but spike in new orders due to post-holiday replenishments and pre-sales before tariff driven infation hit also can cause it. not necessary new capacity.. but it supports earnings narrative so initially it is usually positive news. 
for now real manufacturing facility construction spending doubled since 2021,
Fred's PRMFGCON and electronics manufacturing construction also support onshoring/industrial policy traction narrative, but in reality is mostly near- and friendshoring now.
